headline: IFF Secures First Heart Health Claim for Soy Protein in Australia and New Zealand
summary: ST. LOUIS, March 31, 2026--IFF (NYSE: IFF), a global leader in flavors, fragrances, food ingredients and health & biosciences announced today that a new heart health claim for isolated soy protein has been accepted by the Food Standards Australia New Zealand (FSANZ). The approval enables food and beverage manufacturers in Australia and New Zealand to link soy protein consumption with healthy blood cholesterol levels.

The approval enables food and beverage manufacturers in Australia and New Zealand to link soy protein consumption with healthy blood cholesterol levels.

thumbnail.caption: First heart health claim approved for soy protein in Australia and New Zealand.
